_format.note: Legacy authored prose. Most patient text now lives inline in src/patients.js — these entries are loaded into VOICE in src/data.js but not currently rendered. Kept consistent with the established horror voice. Inline markup: ~~strike~~ for double-strike (the institutional softening of a truer word), [[N]] for an N-char redaction bar, **gold** for the gold accent (rare, on quietly charged words), !!text!! for blood-red text (warnings, refusals, the moment the clinical tone breaks). All prose is sentence case. Patient names appear in [brackets] in the templates. Subtitles and notes are written as institutional patient files in third-person clinical voice.
_format.lookup: Dossier reads: subtitles[species] || subtitles[type]; notes[species] || notes[type]. Battle log reads: actions[abilityKey].use || actionDefaults[element].use; same for hit/flavor. effectDefaults[kind] is consulted when an ability has no damage. afflictions[statusKey].apply / .tick are read on apply / per-turn-tick.
_format.templates: {actor} = name of the doer. {target} = name of the receiver. {name} = ability display name. {status} = affliction name.

subtitles.water: Subject is wet through. The room is dry.
subtitles.grass: Subject grows in here. It should not.
subtitles.light: Subject lights what is around it. Not warmly.
subtitles.dark: Subject is hard to look at. Staff prefer not to.
subtitles.Mireling: There is no pond on the grounds.
subtitles.Frostfin: The bench is not a chair.
subtitles.Hollowoak: She has been given several daughters.
subtitles.Aurabeast: He used to work in records.
subtitles.Voidling: He kept it in the closet for [[6]] years.

fire: We **say no** when family asks if she is in pain.
water: Subject leaves a wet trail. The trail does not evaporate.
Staff have begun to dream of ~~drowning~~ being underneath.
grass: Has been here longer than ~~records~~ files indicate.
light: Subject is luminous in low light.
Staff have begun closing one eye when checking on her.
Reports of headaches in adjacent wards. **Several.**
dark: Subject is photographed only with difficulty.
Patient does not face the camera.
Orderlies prefer to enter in pairs.
Emberkin: Subject was admitted with a perambulator. ~~The perambulator is empty.~~ Contents have not been weighed.
Staff have been instructed not to ~~inform her~~ correct the discrepancy.
Subject was asked when **the child** could be discharged. Subject corrected herself. !!She meant herself.!!
Pyrelord: Subject was pronounced deceased on [[8]]. Subject continues to occupy the chair.
Family ~~visit weekly~~ are summoned weekly. Subject addresses them by name.
Subject has requested his belt. !!The request is on permanent file.!!
Soothlick: Subject's tenure as ward sister spanned ~~thirty~~ thirty-eight years.
Subject's patients ~~expired~~ rested ahead of schedule. No inquest was held.
Subject continues to round. !!Subject does not turn the door handle.!!
Mireling: Subject persists in asking after the pond. There is no pond on the grounds.
Subject describes a ~~stone~~ statue at the edge. Of the right size for a small child.
Family report Subject placed **something** in a pond. They will not say what.
Frostfin: Subject was located at the platform in a state of advanced **preservation**.
She had been there since her ~~husband~~ son said he would come.
Her hands have not warmed. !!Staff do not sit on the bench.!!
Loamback: Subject has been awaiting transfer to [[7]] since 1981.
Subject does not ask after it. She knows the number she is.
When called by another's name, she ~~corrects~~ accepts it.
Sproutkin: Subject has reopened the same wound eleven times.
The bandage is replaced daily. She thanks staff. She **cannot help.**
When asked why, she answered: ~~it is healing wrong~~ it is healing.
Hollowoak: Subject was admitted [[6]] years prior. Subject continues to ~~claim the orderlies~~ recognize the daughter.
Volunteers placed in Subject's room have been ~~reassigned~~ withdrawn. **They do not come out the same.**
When asked her own name, Subject gives the orderly's. !!The orderly does not contradict her.!!
Lumenpup: Subject arrived at the front entrance unaccompanied. No identification provided.
Vitals nominal. Responds to questions. !!Does not remember the address.!!
Settled in the assigned room without resistance. ~~Subject knew the way.~~
Aurabeast: Patient was a records clerk for thirty-one years.
He continues to take notes. The page is blank.
Staff have begun to !!find their words!! in his hand.
Halowyrm: Subject was a piano instructor. A student fell from the lesson-room window on [[8]].
Subject composes the same chord. Subject believes the chord will ~~bring the child back~~ correct the moment.
Each near-completion has cost staff [[3]] minutes of unaccounted time. !!Do not stand at the keyboard.!!
Glimmerfox: Subject was [[1]] years old when [[8]] entered the road. Subject did not look away.
Subject's eyes have not closed since. ~~Pupils dilate normally.~~ Pupils do not register staff.
Staff are instructed !!not to follow Subject's line of sight.!!
Voidling: Patient sealed it in his bedroom closet for thirty-six years.
At admission it was smaller than a fist. !!It has grown since.!!
He calls it by ~~his wife's~~ the name they would have given.

Lumenpup.3: Has begun referring to the south corridor as *home*.
Lumenpup.6: Asked about the room they were admitted with. There is no such room. There never was.
Lumenpup.9: Has stopped responding to designation 0413. !!Responds to 0412.!! Room 0413 now **vacant again.**
